recent_calls.summary: The user called and requested to speak with DJ. The agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate person without any issues.
The user called back after missing a call from the agent. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further conversation.
The user requested to be connected with a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.

The user called to confirm and clarify the timing of their home warranty annual checkup appointment, which they preferred after 3:30 PM on Monday. The agent verified the details, including the dispatch number and service address, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them soon. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate number.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate number. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Elizabeth Curtis, reported a ceiling pipe leak causing damage and requested immediate assistance. The agent collected all necessary details and attempted to transfer the call to an emergency specialist, but no live representative was available. The user's issue was escalated, and an emergency specialist will call back shortly.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to be connected with a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The agent greeted the user and asked how they could assist, but the user did not respond before hanging up.

The user, Tom, called to follow up on a cooling service appointment through their home warranty. The agent confirmed the service type, address, and contact details, and informed Tom that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly to assist. The call ended after confirming all necessary information.
The user called to return a call to Vivi and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Greg Truesdell, called to request an emergency plumbing service to unclog the main drain in the basement due to flooding issues. The agent collected all necessary information and informed the user of the earliest available service slots, which are a few days later. The user was informed that someone would be in touch to confirm availability.

Denise Pope called to inquire about the price for replacing a fifty gallon gas water heater at her standard residential property. The agent confirmed her details, noted her preference for a call today, and acknowledged her existing appointment on Monday the sixth. The agent assured Denise that the team would try to reach out as soon as possible for a quote.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent greeted the user and asked if they were still there. No further conversation or assistance took place.
The user, Laura, requested a return call after receiving a call from someone named DG. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent for further help.

The user, Deborah Dow, called to confirm and set up a cooling service appointment for a noisy fan on the outside unit at her home in Maryland Heights, Missouri. The agent successfully booked an appointment for Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. The user declined to provide feedback and the call ended positively.

Denise called to request urgent service for her water heater, which turns off after about five minutes. The agent booked an appointment for Wednesday at 8:00 a.m. and informed Denise about the $99 service fee. The call ended after confirming the booking and discussing the fee.

The user called to report an emergency issue with their AC unit at 2044 New Sun Drive and provided all necessary details for service dispatch. The AI agent confirmed the information, assured the user that the emergency request would be sent to the team, and offered information about maintenance programs, which the user declined. The user gave positive feedback about the AI assistant's performance before the call ended.

Denise called about her water heater that turns off after being on for some time and needs immediate attention. The agent booked a provisional appointment for Tuesday, April 7th, between noon and 2 p.m., as no earlier slots were available, and assured Denise that the team would confirm the exact time shortly.

Denise called to schedule a service appointment for her water heater, which turns off after being turned on. The agent confirmed details and informed her that no same-day appointments were available, offering alternative dates starting April 8th. Denise inquired about availability for the upcoming Monday, but was told the earliest Monday slot was April 13th.

The agent repeatedly requested the user's five-digit ZIP code to proceed, but the user only pressed zero and did not provide the ZIP code. The user ended the call by saying they would call back later.

Denise called to schedule a plumbing service appointment for her water heater, which turns on but keeps shutting off. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and preferred appointment time for tomorrow morning, and noted that Denise has a dog at the property. Denise provided positive feedback about the service and the call ended successfully with the appointment request recorded.

The user, Deborah Doll, called to schedule an air conditioning service appointment due to a loud noise from the outside fan. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the service address, and noted the user's flexibility on timing. Deborah expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the call ended with the agent promising a follow-up from the team.

Laura Gleason called to report a furnace leak causing no heat or hot water. The gas is turned off and the gas company will not restore it. The agent documented the issue as urgent and escalated it for next business day follow-up since it was after hours.

The user called Budget's after-hours service and provided their ZIP code 63376. The agent greeted the user and asked how to assist, but the user repeated the agent's question without further details before ending the call.

Jessa from American Home Shield called to request an urgent update on dispatch number 29377179 regarding air conditioning service at 3011 South Compton Avenue, St. Louis. The agent confirmed the details, noted the urgency, and arranged for a priority follow-up with callback to Jessa and the member, James Finn. The call concluded with Jessa providing feedback and the agent assuring prompt attention to the request.

The user, Emily, called to inquire about the next steps after deciding to proceed with a cooling service and signing the email. The agent confirmed the service type and asked for more details, but the user seemed uncertain and ended the call shortly after realizing the agent was AI.

The user, Hyonae Mackay, called to report that their technician did not arrive for a scheduled appointment between 12:00 pm and 2:00 pm, and it was now 4:45 pm with no one present. The agent apologized for the inconvenience, documented the issue, and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day. The user also inquired about weekend hours, which the agent provided.

Tony Edmunds called to report an urgent issue with the blower motor of his mother's heating system, which is not working. He expressed frustration over repeated service charges despite the part being under warranty and requested that the repair be prioritized due to his mother's health. The agent documented the emergency and assured Tony that the team would follow up the next business day to resolve the issue.

Deborah called to check if a technician was still scheduled to come out today, expressing frustration about the wait time until April 13th. The agent confirmed the appointment for April 13th and, after hearing Deborah's dissatisfaction, transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.

Debbie from American Home Shield called to follow up on a heating dispatch to check if any work has been done. The agent confirmed the dispatch number and contact details, and assured that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would provide an immediate update. The agent also offered information about home maintenance programs, but the user's response was inaudible.

The user received a call from Budget and was connected to a live agent named Sophie. Sophie attempted to transfer the user to another live agent for further assistance, and the transfer was successful.

Frank Camerata called to inquire about the expected arrival time of his technician, mentioning a previous update that the technician was three stops away. The agent confirmed his identity and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called Budget and requested customer service. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to report a running toilet and requested a service appointment to have it looked at. The agent confirmed it was not an emergency and asked for the user's full name to proceed with scheduling.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent, Sophie, transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to inquire about the status of their 12 to 2 o'clock appointment, asking if someone would show up or if the appointment was forgotten. The agent collected the user's name and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user reported an emergency plumbing issue where water backs up in the basement every time they run water. The agent confirmed the details and assured the user that a team would follow up as soon as possible to address the emergency. The user confirmed the information and ended the call after receiving confirmation of next steps.

The user, Deborah, called to confirm if a technician was supposed to come today and to request an earlier appointment than the one scheduled for April 13th. The agent confirmed the appointment details and assured Deborah that her request to reschedule and comments about today's appointment would be passed to the team for follow-up.

The user, Ronnie, called to inquire about their annual heater and AC tune-up subscription and wanted to know the type of service last performed. The agent explained the process and offered to schedule the next tune-up, but the user requested to speak with a live person. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Levy called to schedule a service appointment for a flue cap under their American Home Shield home warranty plan, preferring Monday for the appointment. The agent confirmed the details and informed Levy that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. Levy declined information about maintenance programs and was unable to provide feedback due to being in a meeting.
